query:
SELECT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM balance_changes bc
            WHERE bc.account_id = $1
              AND bc.token_id LIKE 'intents.near:%'
              AND bc.block_height > COALESCE(
                  (SELECT MAX(ds.block_height) FROM detected_swaps ds WHERE ds.account_id = $1),
                  0
              )
        ) AS "exists!"
